figures.caption: Figure 3: Overview of the AVP framework.
Figure 4: OOD object gallery for cross-domain generalization. We evaluate zero-shot transfer on 45 unseen objects spanning multiple categories beyond the Chinese chess training domain.

Figure 5: Qualitative results for zero-shot cross-domain generalization. The leftmost column displays unseen OOD test objects, and the right columns illustrate the successful grasping trajectories executed by AVP.
